welcomeSubtitle: Your gateway to the decentralized future

passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

cannotRecoverPassword: StableNet cannot recover your password. Make sure to store it safely.
agreeCannotRecover: I understand that StableNet cannot recover this password

incorrectWord: Incorrect word selected. Please try again.
